Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: This gives a nice interleaved story user starts drafting Document1 checks email reviews PDF updates budget returns to Document1 to add budget reference closes it then works on Quarterly Report

Text: For Quarterly Report two options one case spanning 085950 to 090815 with a gap or treat the 085950 focus as part of the case that begins then is interrupted then resumed

Name: Validation - PE
Text: Actually a coherent narrative The user opens the day focusing on Quarterly Report brief look then switches to Document1 then at the end comes back to Quarterly Report to write the executive summary So one case with an interruption is fine
